response.justification: While Bogdan is a senior engineer with strong software craftsmanship skills, the role explicitly requires native-level Japanese language proficiency, which is absent from his resume. More fundamentally, his recent career (5+ years) has shifted toward TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud infrastructure, away from the embedded C development, security, and networking expertise this role demands. His most relevant embedded systems and C work dates to 2014-2015. The significant gap between his recent portfolio and the role's domain-specific requirements—particularly security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X), networking protocols (NETCONF, SNMP), and kernel-level Linux work—makes this a poor fit.
strengths: Senior-level engineer with 15+ years of diverse software experience and proven ability to learn new technologies
Demonstrated C/C++ and embedded systems proficiency from earlier career (National Instruments, Altom); strong foundation in Linux
Exceptional software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture, and mentoring—qualities that transfer across domains
concerns: No Japanese language proficiency listed; role explicitly requires native-level fluency
Career trajectory over the past 5+ years has moved away from embedded C toward TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud platforms
No demonstrated expertise in security technologies, networking protocols, or LAN-switch products—all core to this role

key_factors.factor: C/Embedded Systems Expertise Outdated (5+ Year Gap)
